headline: Is Alaska Air (ALK) Quietly Repositioning Its Brand With Boardroom Tech Talent And Lounge Investments?
summary: Alaska Air Group recently appointed former T-Mobile CEO Mike Sievert to its board, while also investing US$18 million in a new, larger Portland airport lounge as part of a broader lounge expansion plan. Sievert’s combination of large-scale digital leadership experience, aviation passion as a licensed pilot, and committee roles in Safety and Innovation could influence how Alaska Air Group balances operational rigor with customer-focused product upgrades. Next, we’ll examine how Sievert’s...
